---
title: "Finding Speeches in the Riksdag's Debates"
description: |
  The Riksdag is the Parliament of Sweden. It has made available twenty 
  years of parliamentary debates through its website and open data platform.
  Each speech is accompanied by rich metadata, including a transcript and 
  markers indicating its start location and duration within the media file 
  of the debate. We however find a not so insiginificant portion of the speeches 
  have been misaligned, with the metadata being particularly unreliable for 
  debates prior to 2012. In this work, we employ automatic speech recognition and 
  speaker diarization to devise a fully automated approach towards aligning 
  transcripts with their corresponding speech in audio files. The alignment is 
  achieved using only an official transcript, without the reliance on any further 
  metadata.
author:
  - name: Faton Rekathati
    url: https://github.com/Lauler
    affiliation: KBLab
    affiliation_url: https://www.kb.se/in-english/research-collaboration/kblab.html
date: 2023-01-16
preview: images/sentence_transformer.svg
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

Some text above the debate.

## Videos

::: l-page
```{=html}
<div class="videobox">
  <iframe id="videokb" src="https://www.riksdagen.se/views/pages/embedpage.aspx?did=HAC120230118pd&start=2640" allowfullscreen="" scrolling="no" title="Partiledardebatt 18 januari 2023 från Riksdagen om Partiledardebatt" style="width: 510px; height: 288px; border: 0´; margin-bottom: 0em;"></iframe>
  </video>
  <div class="metabox">
    <form action="">
      <input type="button" id="prevspeech" value="Previous speech"/>
      <input type="button" id="nextspeech" value="Next speech"/>
    </form>
    <h3>Adjusted metadata (KBLab)</h3>
    <p><u>Beginning of official transcript</u></p>
    <p id="speechtranscript"></p>
    <p id="metadatastart"></p>
    <p><small><i>Source: Sveriges riksdag.</i></small></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="videobox">
  <iframe id="videoriks" src="https://www.riksdagen.se/views/pages/embedpage.aspx?did=HAC120230118pd&start=2640" allowfullscreen="" scrolling="no" title="Partiledardebatt 18 januari 2023 från Riksdagen om Partiledardebatt" style="width: 510px; height: 288px; border: 0; margin-bottom: 0em;"></iframe>
  <div class=metabox>
    <form action="">
      <input type="button" id="prevspeech2" value="Previous speech"/>
      <input type="button" id="nextspeech2" value="Next speech"/>
    </form>
    <h3>The Riksdag's metadata</h3>
    <p><u>Beginning of official transcript</u></p>
    <p id="speechtranscript2"></p>
    <p id="metadatastart2"></p>
    <p><small><i>Source: Sveriges riksdag.</i></small></p>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

```{js echo=FALSE}
var metadata = [
    { transcript: "Fru talman! Tack för...", start: 100, duration: 98, src: "https://www.riksdagen.se/views/pages/embedpage.aspx?did=HAC120230118pd&start=3600"},
    { transcript: "Herr talman! Det är inte mer än rätt att...", start: 200, duration: 92, src: "https://www.riksdagen.se/views/pages/embedpage.aspx?did=HAC120230118pd&start=640" },
    { transcript: "Fru ålderspresident! Jag tackar för ministerns svar...", start: 300, duration: 87, src: "https://www.riksdagen.se/views/pages/embedpage.aspx?did=HAC120230118pd&start=1500" },
    {transcript: "Herr talman! Det är naturligtvis viktigt...", start: 400, duration: 82, src: "https://www.riksdagen.se/views/pages/embedpage.aspx?did=GS01UU12&start=704"}
];

var i = 0;

transcript1 = document.getElementById("speechtranscript");
transcript2 = document.getElementById("speechtranscript2");
metadata1 = document.getElementById("metadatastart");
metadata2 = document.getElementById("metadatastart2");

// Initialize transcripts
transcript1.textContent = metadata[i].transcript;
transcript2.textContent = metadata[i].transcript;

//add event listener
prevspeech.addEventListener('click', prevClickEvent);
prevspeech2.addEventListener('click', prevClickEvent);
nextspeech.addEventListener('click', nextClickEvent);
nextspeech2.addEventListener('click', nextClickEvent);

// Video

var iframe = document.getElementById('videokb');

function prevClickEvent() {
  if (i > 0) {
    i--;
    document.getElementById('videokb').src = metadata[i].src;
    document.getElementById('videoriks').src = metadata[i].src;
  }
  
  transcript1.textContent = metadata[i].transcript;
  transcript2.textContent = metadata[i].transcript;
  metadata1.innerHTML = "<b>Start:</b> " + metadata[i].start;
  metadata1.innerHTML += "<b>  End:</b> " + (metadata[i].start + metadata[i].duration);
  metadata2.innerHTML = "<b>Start:</b> " + metadata[i].start;
  metadata2.innerHTML += "<b>  End:</b> " + (metadata[i].start + metadata[i].duration); 
}

function nextClickEvent() {
  if (i < (metadata.length - 1)) {
    i++;
    document.getElementById('videokb').src = metadata[i].src;
    document.getElementById('videoriks').src = metadata[i].src;
  }
  
  transcript1.textContent = metadata[i].transcript;
  transcript2.textContent = metadata[i].transcript;
  metadata1.innerHTML = "<b>Start:</b> " + metadata[i].start;
  metadata1.innerHTML += "<b>  End:</b> " + (metadata[i].start + metadata[i].duration);
  metadata2.innerHTML = "<b>Start:</b> " + metadata[i].start;
  metadata2.innerHTML += "<b>  End:</b> " + (metadata[i].start + metadata[i].duration); 
}
```






```{css echo=FALSE}
.videobox{
    float:left;
    align-content: center;
    margin-right:20px;
    border:2px;
}
.clear{
    clear:both;
}

.metabox{
    background-color: #d1d1e0;
    margin: 0px;
}

.metabox > * {
  padding-left: 6px;
}
```


## Evaluation results

::: l-page
```{r fig.retina = 2, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("monthly_bleu.jpg")
```
:::
